scripts.compress-js: for file in resources/assets/js/*.js; do uglifyjs $file -c -m -o public/js/$(basename $file .js).min.js; done
scripts.build:js: npm run compress-js && echo 'Javascript Compression completed.'
scripts.compile-less: for file in resources/assets/less/*.less; do filename=$(basename "$file"); filename_without_extension="${filename%.*}"; lessc "$file" "resources/assets/vendor/css/$filename_without_extension.css"; done
scripts.watch-less: chokidar 'resources/assets/less/*.less' -c 'npm run compile-less && npm run minify-css'
scripts.build:less: npm run compile-less && npm run minify-css && echo 'Production build completed.'
scripts.watch: npm run watch-js & npm run watch-less
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:less
